frames.name: Strategic Incoherence
frames.description: Portrays Trump's Iran policy as chaotic, contradictory, and lacking clear objectives or strategy
frames.emphasis: Inconsistent messaging, shifting timelines, absence of coherent strategy

frames.name: Political Betrayal
frames.description: Frames the war as Trump abandoning his anti-war campaign promises and betraying his base
frames.emphasis: Contradiction with 'America First' messaging and peace candidate positioning

frames.name: Risk-Benefit Analysis
frames.description: Presents balanced examination of potential strategic gains versus dangers of military action
frames.emphasis: Weighing degraded Iranian capabilities against risks of retaliation and escalation

frames.name: Communication Crisis
frames.description: Focuses on Trump's scattered media approach and failure to provide clear public explanation
frames.emphasis: Lack of formal address to nation, contradictory interview statements

frames.name: Domestic Political Calculation
frames.description: Views the war through lens of Trump's domestic political needs and electoral concerns
frames.emphasis: Connection between foreign war and domestic power consolidation

frames.name: Intelligence Failure
frames.description: Questions the claimed 'imminent threat' justification for military action
frames.emphasis: Lack of evidence for stated threat assessment

outlierPerspectives: The war as personal branding exercise - The Guardian's characterization of the conflict as 'Trump Iran War' reflecting narcissistic motivations
Venezuelan operation as template - Trump's reported comparison to Maduro capture mission mentioned only in Axios
Military leadership purge - The Guardian's exclusive focus on dismissal of joint chiefs director before attacks
missingContext: Congressional authorization status and legal framework for the military action
Allied support or opposition beyond brief mention of 'lack of support from allies'
Iranian civilian casualties and humanitarian impact
Economic costs and funding mechanisms for the military operation
Regional reactions from key Middle Eastern allies and adversaries
Timeline and details of the claimed negotiations that preceded military action
Specific intelligence assessments that contradicted 'imminent threat' claims
